Who We Are
About GB Group
Founder & CEO
Gokhul Balaji G S
GB Group of Companies
"Building dreams through layouts."

A young entrepreneur with a clear vision — to make premium real estate accessible, transparent, and trustworthy for every family across Tamil Nadu. Gokhul founded GB Group with the belief that every plot sold is not just a transaction, but a dream fulfilled.

GB Group of Companies is a premium real estate developer based in Tamil Nadu, focused on delivering DTCP and RERA approved residential plots across Rasipuram, Tiruppur, Coimbatore, Erode, and Salem.

We started with a simple but powerful idea — that buying land should be easy, honest, and exciting. From our very first layout to our growing portfolio of projects, every development we build is designed with the buyer's future in mind.

Our layouts are not just plots of land — they are well-planned communities with proper roads, greenery, clear title deeds, and all government approvals in place.

At GB Group, we don't just sell plots. We build legacies, one layout at a time.

Transparency
Clear pricing, honest documentation, and no hidden costs — ever.
Quality
Every development adheres to the highest construction and planning standards.
Timely Delivery
We respect your investment and deliver on schedule, every time.
Customer First
From enquiry to registration, your satisfaction is our metric of success.
